title: indocalamus humilis
intro: Indocalamus humilis, also known as bamboo grass or Chinese timber bamboo, is a type of bamboo species native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in wound healing, as well as lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Indocalamus humilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
